title: kaulinia hancockii
side_effects: Kaulinia hancockii can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal issues. In severe cases, it may cause respiratory problems, dizziness, and nausea. Long-term exposure to its toxic compounds can lead to kidney damage, cardiovascular issues, and even neurological disorders. Prolonged consumption of kaulinia hancockii can also result in anemia, thyroid problems, and hormonal imbalances.
